name: Fishman, Larsen & Callister
message: [AI generated] "Fishman, Larsen & Callister" is a full-service law firm based in Fresno, California, USA. Their team of experienced attorneys specializes in several areas of law, including corporate, real estate, litigation, labor & employment, and estate planning. The firm is dedicated to providing the highest quality legal services, emphasizing professionalism, integrity, and attention to detail.
